repair_memories_applied.natural_language: When opbuild fails in TilingFunc with error 'class optiling::Ca6k00188CustomTilingData has no member named set_*', do not use setter methods to assign tiling data; instead assign directly to the public fields (e.g., tiling.totalRows = totalRows).

When generating the operator txt file for Ca6k00163Custom, do not remove the OpDef class or REG_OP macro from the operator description; instead keep the operator registration to ensure correct inference, tiling, and non-zero output.

repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: The current op ca6k_02116 (torch#1 category) may encounter common build/compilation issues seen across ca6k custom ops. The five selected memories address frequent error patterns: redefinition of operator class in op_proto.h (193e1ac4, 36fd506b), missing TilingData setter methods (84bb2c98, 0ed87544), and StorageShape/Shape conversion errors (6e9b566c). These are the most likely pitfalls for a new custom operator and provide concrete fixes.
